productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Issac Black Orange Flip Flop
description: Walking on a puma Issac feels like walking on cotton. To add oodles of style, team this flip-flop with casual denims and a comfort Fit tee.Upper Quick-drying EVA upper for dry comfort for the feet Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and style Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for step-in comfort Coloured brand prints on the footbed Outsole TPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and traction shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
